name: Micro Striped Textured Shower Curtain Khaki - Threshold™
description:
For subtle style, decorate your bath space with this Solid Textured Shower Curtain from Threshold™. Showcasing an off-white hue with a textured weave for added visual interest, this shower curtain easily blends with a variety of bathroom decor styles, and it features a buttonhole top for easy hanging around your bathtub or shower stall. This decorative shower curtain is made from 100% cotton, and it can be tossed in the washing machine for easy cleaning when needed.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
